GEN.1.1.KJV: In the beginning God created the heaven and the earth.
GEN.1.1.ASV: In the beginning God created the heavens and the earth.
GEN.1.1.WEB: In the beginning, God created the heavens and the earth.
GEN.1.1.YLT: In the beginning of God's preparing the heavens and the earth.

EXO.12.13.KJV: And the blood shall be to you for a token upon the houses where ye are.
EXO.12.13.ASV: And the blood shall be to you for a token upon the houses where ye are.
EXO.12.13.WEB: The blood shall be to you for a token on the houses where you are.
EXO.12.13.YLT: And the blood hath become a sign for you on the houses where ye are.

PSA.23.1.KJV: The Lord is my shepherd; I shall not want.
PSA.23.1.ASV: Jehovah is my shepherd; I shall not want.
PSA.23.1.WEB: Yahweh is my shepherd: I shall lack nothing.
PSA.23.1.YLT: Jehovah is my shepherd, I do not lack.

JHN.1.1.KJV: In the beginning was the Word, and the Word was with God, and the Word was God.
JHN.1.1.ASV: In the beginning was the Word, and the Word was with God, and the Word was God.
JHN.1.1.WEB: In the beginning was the Word, and the Word was with God, and the Word was God.
JHN.1.1.YLT: In the beginning was the Word, and the Word was with God, and the Word was God.

JHN.1.29.KJV: Behold the Lamb of God, which taketh away the sin of the world.
JHN.1.29.ASV: Behold, the Lamb of God, that taketh away the sin of the world.
JHN.1.29.WEB: Behold, the Lamb of God, who takes away the sin of the world.
JHN.1.29.YLT: Lo, the Lamb of God, who is taking away the sin of the world.

ROM.8.1.KJV: There is therefore now no condemnation to them which are in Christ Jesus.
ROM.8.1.ASV: There is therefore now no condemnation to them that are in Christ Jesus.
ROM.8.1.WEB: There is therefore now no condemnation to those who are in Christ Jesus.
ROM.8.1.YLT: There is, then, now no condemnation to those in Christ Jesus.

1CO.5.7.KJV: For even Christ our passover is sacrificed for us.
1CO.5.7.ASV: For our passover also hath been sacrificed, even Christ.
1CO.5.7.WEB: For indeed Christ, our Passover, has been sacrificed in our place.
1CO.5.7.YLT: For also our passover for us was sacrificed, Christ.

REV.21.1.KJV: And I saw a new heaven and a new earth.
REV.21.1.ASV: And I saw a new heaven and a new earth.
REV.21.1.WEB: I saw a new heaven and a new earth.
REV.21.1.YLT: And I saw a new heaven and a new earth.
